name: Rice Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the rice, corn, peppers, kidney beans, and onion.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together 6 tablespoons distilled white vinegar, 3 tablespoons vegetable oil, 2 teaspoons soy sauce or tamari, 2 teaspoons prepared mustard, and 1 teaspoon prepared horseradish.
3. Pour the dressing over the rice mixture and toss well to combine.
